page_content:
Corequisite: EDCP618.

Restriction: Must be in a major within EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

EDCP616 Counseling II: Theory and Practice (3 Credits) Counseling theories and the practices which stem from such theories. Corequisite: EDCP614.

EDCP617 Group Counseling (3 Credits)

A survey of theory, research and practice of group counseling and psychotherapy, with an introduction to growth groups and the laboratory approach, therapeutic factors in groups, composition of therapeutic groups, problem clients, therapeutic techniques, research methods, theories, ethics and training of group counselors and therapists. Prerequisite: EDCP616.
